arts.ttl: The Esposito brothers: Inter Milan’s rising stars
arts.sum: Inter Milan has big plans for the talented Esposito brothers, Sebastiano and Francesco Pio. The post The Esposito brothers: Inter Milan’s rising stars appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Inter preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Bayer Leverkusen and Inter, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Inter Milan: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Head coach Simone Inzaghi has no shortage of familar faces to call on, with Marko Arnautović, Yann Aurel Bisseck, Hakan Çalhanoğlu, Henrikh Mkhitaryan, Benjamin Pavard, Yann Sommer and Marcus Thuram all having played in the Bundesliga at some stage in their careers. Leverkusen are enjoying a five-match winning run in all competitions that includes a workmanlike victory over Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich in the DFB Cup round of 16.
